arts.ttl: Finance expert claims there are ‘red flags’ surrounding Newcastle transfer
arts.sum: Finance expert Stefan Borson has claimed that Newcastle’s purchase of Odysseas Vlachodimos has raised some ‘red flags’. Eddie Howe’s side has started the new Premier League season strong, producing impressive performances against Tottenham Hotspur and Wolves although they had a slight hiccup against Bournemouth. After what was a rollercoaster of a campaign, the Magpies will […] The post Finance expert claims there are ‘red flags’ surrounding Newcastle transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 3pm team news: Jota benched, Isak + Watkins start
arts.sum: The team news from the 3pm kick-offs The post 3pm team news: Jota benched, Isak + Watkins start appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe amused when asked if Newcastle United are ready to challenge for the title
arts.sum: Eddie Howe laughed off the prospect of his team challenging for the Premier League title this season - but insists it will be a "nice" feeling for his players to experience being top of the table. For us, it’s about just staying very calm and trying to win every game we play.

arts.ttl: Tonali returns and key Barnes role in Newcastle United predicted XI for Fulham
arts.sum: Newcastle United predicted XI vs Fulham: Pope, Livramento, Schar, Burn, Hall, Tonali, Guimaraes, Joelinton, Barnes, Gordon, Murphy. Of course Howe and United won't take any risks with the Swede, who is instrumental to the side, but if the foot injury he picked up against Wolves last weekend does rule him out today, then the Newcastle head coach is confident of still being able to pick an attacking line up.

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon backed to become 'one of the best wingers in the world' after classy moment
arts.sum: Newcastle United winger Anthony Gordon has been tipped to become one of the best wingers in the world following his recent displays for England in the Nations League. Speaking to Fotbollskanalen about the game, Tenho said: “Gordon gave him [Ståhl] some difficulties.

arts.ttl: Fulham vs Newcastle: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: The Magpies were pretty dire away from home last season, but they did enjoy their visits to Craven Cottage - securing victories in the FA Cup and Premier League at Fulham's ground. Newcastle are on the road for the second consecutive weekend as they travel to the capital to take on Marco Silva's Fulham.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United stadium change photos leaked with feasibility report results 'imminent'
arts.sum: Regardless of what Newcastle can or can't do at St James' Park, it has always been feasible that the East Stand area of the ground - opened in 1973 and currently houses 5,000 fans - will be the area that can somehow be upgraded. The East Stand area of the ground has already hit the headlines this season after a row over a wooden fence erected outside St James' Park led to annoyance from both the club and the fanbase on safety concerns.

arts.ttl: 'My information is': Craig Hope issues big Alexander Isak update ahead of Newcastle vs Fulham
arts.sum: Craig Hope has issued a big injury update on Alexander Isak ahead of Newcastle United vs Fulham.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United squad revealed for Fulham with Eddie Howe facing big decision
arts.sum: Gordon took up a central role in the second half against Wolves and, if Isak is ruled out today, is likely to start through the middle again at Craven Cottage, with Harvey Barnes and Jacob Murphy on the flanks. The debate in the full-back positions continues, with Tino Livramento and Lewis Hall starting at Wolves, although Kieran Trippier replaced the former in the second half.

arts.ttl: Is Fulham vs Newcastle United on TV, what time is kick-off and how can I stream it?
arts.sum: TNT Sports are showing the West Ham vs Chelsea game, while Sky Sports will broadcast tonight's match between Crystal Palace and Manchester United. The game kicks off at 3pm today, Saturday, September 21, at Craven Cottage, Fulham.
